  3. Paddletek Tempest Wave Pro v3

Paddletek

Paddletek Tempest Wave Pro v3

Long-running control paddle for touch, resets, and developing all-court consistency.

A familiar control option for players who prefer a classic shape and predictable response over maximum power.

TypeControl
Shapetraditional
CorePolymer honeycomb
FaceTextured graphite
Reference price$179.99
Price noteTypical Paddletek Tempest premium control price, verify current retailer/brand listing
Level2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0
TraitsControl, Touch, Forgiveness
Used by / linePaddletek control line
